subtasks.description: Generate SQL to compute quarter-over-quarter spend change for each publisher (Adobe and Microsoft) across all quarters in 2024, and rank products within each publisher by Q4 2024 spend. Return data with publisher, product, Q1/Q2/Q3/Q4 spend, QoQ change percentages, and product rank within publisher by Q4 spend.

plan.cost_rationale: Single SQL query needed: This is a multi-table join with aggregation by quarter, window functions for ranking within publisher groups, and QoQ change calculation—all within one SQL statement. This is moderate complexity requiring mid-tier capability to handle the window function (RANK/ROW_NUMBER over PARTITION BY publisher) and quarter-over-quarter delta logic. No data reconciliation from multiple sources required. No policy evaluation needed. Therefore: 1 subtask, mid tier (Sonnet 4.6).

output.raw_output:
{"sql": "WITH quarterly_spend AS (
  SELECT
    publisher,
    product,
    SUM(CASE WHEN fiscal_quarter = 1 THEN amount_usd ELSE 0 END) AS q1_spend,
    SUM(CASE WHEN fiscal_quarter = 2 THEN amount_usd ELSE 0 END) AS q2_spend,
    SUM(CASE WHEN fiscal_quarter = 3 THEN amount_usd ELSE 0 END) AS q3_spend,
    SUM(CASE WHEN fiscal_quarter = 4 THEN amount_usd ELSE 0 END) AS q4_spend
  FROM consumption_facts
  WHERE publisher IN ('Adobe', 'Microsoft')
    AND event_date >= '2024-01-01'
    AND event_date < '2025-01-01'
  GROUP BY publisher, product
),
publisher_totals AS (
  SELECT
    publisher,
    SUM(CASE WHEN fiscal_quarter = 1 THEN amount_usd ELSE 0 END) AS pub_q1_spend,
    SUM(CASE WHEN fiscal_quarter = 2 THEN amount_usd ELSE 0 END) AS pub_q2_spend,
    SUM(CASE WHEN fiscal_quarter = 3 THEN amount_usd ELSE 0 END) AS pub_q3_spend,
    SUM(CASE WHEN fiscal_quarter = 4 THEN amount_usd ELSE 0 END) AS pub_q4_spend
  FROM consumption_facts
  WHERE publisher IN ('Adobe', 'Microsoft')
    AND event_date >= '2024-01-01'
    AND event_date < '2025-01-01'
  GROUP BY publisher
)
SELECT
  qs.publisher,
  qs.product,
  qs.q1_spend,
  qs.q2_spend,
  qs.q3_spend,
  qs.q4_spend,
  CASE
    WHEN qs.q1_spend = 0 THEN NULL
    ELSE ROUND(((qs.q2_spend - qs.q1_spend) / NULLIF(qs.q1_spend, 0)) * 100, 2)
  END AS q1_to_q2_pct_change,
  CASE
    WHEN qs.q2_spend = 0 THEN NULL
    ELSE ROUND(((qs.q3_spend - qs.q2_spend) / NULLIF(qs.q2_spend, 0)) * 100, 2)
  END AS q2_to_q3_pct_change,
  CASE
    WHEN qs.q3_spend = 0 THEN NULL
    ELSE ROUND(((qs.q4_spend - qs.q3_spend) / NULLIF(qs.q3_spend, 0)) * 100, 2)
  END AS q3_to_q4_pct_change,
  pt.pub_
